title: Revert recent widget colour and visual changes

requirements.text: Revert all frontend visual/styling changes introduced in the most recent session (Version 10), including: sidebar background colour changes, 'Made by DEV' badge styling/colours, any widget colour overrides, and any other cosmetic modifications made in that session — restoring them to their prior state.

quotes: Undo all changes only you have done now only of now like widget colour etc .

acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar colour is restored to the value it had before Version 10 changes.
The 'Made by DEV' badge styling/colours match the pre-Version-10 state.
All widget colours (calendar widget, streak card, quote card, etc.) are restored to their pre-Version-10 appearance.
No other layout or functional changes are introduced — only cosmetic/colour reversal.
The app renders without console errors after the revert.

constraints: Only revert cosmetic/colour/styling changes introduced in Version 10 — do not touch backend logic, data models, or functional features.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or components/ui.
nonGoals: Reverting functional features added in Version 10 (subject target reminders, pro button, calendar icon).
Introducing new visual styles or redesigns.
